title: Great Park Academy: 15 September 2025
body: "Decision reference: ADA4397, 4399-4402, 4407, 4421, 4422, 4426, 4427, 4429, 4431, 4444, 4445, 4448, 4449  Type of decision: objection to admission arrangements for September 2026 – partially upheld  School type: academy  School phase: middle-deemed-secondary  Local authority: Newcastle-Upon-Tyne  Admission authority: Gosforth Federated Academies Ltd "
